content: Before Nosgoth's Recorded History
The Wheel of Fate
The Land of Nosgoth – ruled by the two elder races, similar in power, but different in method and intention: the Vampires, and the Hylden.

The Vampires start worshipping the Wheel of Fate; a god that represents the cleansing agony of birth, death, and rebirth, the purifying rhythm of the universe – the cycle which sustains all life, to which all souls are irresistibly drawn, manipulated by the parasitic Elder God.
The Vampire-Hylden War
The Hylden oppose the Vampires’ tyrannous God, and refuse to submit to the Wheel of Fate. For this, the Vampires oppress their Hylden adversaries.
